✦ About Us

Building a Foundation
for Lifelong Learning

🏫 Dostpur, Sultanpur

Scholar's Home Bal Shikshan Sansthan is a dedicated English medium institution in Dostpur, Sultanpur (U.P.), committed to providing quality education in a nurturing and disciplined environment.


Our school blends academic rigour with character building, preparing students not just for examinations but for life. We believe every child carries unique potential, and our role is to help them discover and develop it.

📚

English Medium

Complete English-medium instruction from Nursery to Class X.

🌱

Holistic Growth

Academics, sports, arts and values — all under one roof.

👨‍🏫

Qualified Staff

Experienced and caring teachers dedicated to every child.

🔒

Safe Environment

A secure and friendly campus where students thrive.

✦ Our Leadership

The Visionaries Behind
Scholar's Home

Founder & Owner

Mr. Siyaram Tripathi

Founder & Owner

"My dream was to bring quality English-medium education to every child of Dostpur — regardless of their background. Scholar's Home is that dream, brought to life."

Principal

Dr. Durga Dutt Tripathi

Principal & Academic Head

"Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire. At Scholar's Home, we kindle that fire every single day — inspiring curiosity, compassion, and the courage to dream big."

✦ Academics

A Strong Academic
Programme

🌼

Pre-Primary

Play-way and activity-based learning to build a love for school and exploration from day one.

Nursery · LKG · UKG
📖

Primary School

Core subjects with interactive teaching methods, building strong literacy, numeracy and conceptual skills.

Class I – V
🔬

Middle School

Deeper engagement with Science, Mathematics, Social Studies, and languages in a structured curriculum.

Class VI – VIII
🏆

High School

Comprehensive preparation for board examinations with focus on concept clarity and exam techniques.

Class IX – X

✦ Admissions

Begin Your Child's
Journey With Us

Our simple 4-step admission process ensures a smooth and welcoming experience for every family.

1

Collect Prospectus

Visit the school office or fill the enquiry form online. Our staff will guide you through the requirements.

2

Submit Application

Fill in the application form with the student's details and attach required documents (birth certificate, previous mark sheet, photograph).

3

Interaction / Test

A brief interaction for pre-primary, and a simple written test for Classes II and above to understand the student's level.

4

Fee Deposit & Enrollment

Upon selection, deposit the fees and complete the enrollment formalities to secure your child's seat.

Enquire Now
